items.title: Messi nets again, Argentina earn third WC win
items.summary: Lionel Messi came off the bench in Argentina's group stage finale against Jordan in the World Cup and scored in a 3-1 victory for the reigning champions.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: DR Congo's 'standing superfan' misses match after US visa denial
items.summary: DR Congo's iconic football fan, "Lumumba Vea," missed a crucial World Cup match against Uzbekistan due to a US visa denial. Known for his unique tribute to Patrice Lumumba, his...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Chaudhary's last-ball six wins it for Freedom after Hosein's hat-trick
items.summary: Mitchell Owen set up Freedom's chase with 77 off 35 before the match hurtled towards a chaotic finish
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
